verdicts.note: Organizational leadership and absence of auditor-office tenure do not affirmatively establish the rubric's new-voice or renewal pole.
Organizational leadership and absence of auditor-office tenure do not affirmatively establish the rubric's new-voice or renewal pole.
CPA preparation is relevant professional experience, but lack of auditor-office tenure is not affirmative evidence for the renewal pole and does not support a genuinely mixed zero.

review_notes: All five authored pairs were checked. Oversight positions support modest spending scores; challenger status alone does not support positive experience scores.
